summary: Staged changes align with Step 4: tools are first-class and grouped by task, guides are reframed as teaching/reference pages with action handoffs, high-impact guides link onward to tools/map, and smoke coverage was expanded for the hubs.
plan_section: Step 4: Tools, guides, and learning IA handoff consistency

plan_alignment.notes: Implements the planned guides-teach/tools-do handoffs, preserves tool and guide URLs, and avoids new workflows or disclaimers.

correctness_safety.notes: Internal and external links are appropriate; new external Discord usage includes target and rel safety attributes.

code_quality.notes: Changes are readable, data-driven where useful, and consistent with existing brand components.

completeness.notes: All four tools and all guide pages are surfaced; high-impact guide handoffs and Playwright assertions were added.

patterns.notes: The overall pattern is consistent, with one minor remaining label inconsistency around the serial tool.

integration.notes: No route, import/export, or client-component integration issues found in the reviewed staged changes.

findings.note: Homepage still labels the USB tool as "Web Serial console" while Step 4 standardizes touched hub/guide copy around "Serial USB console". This is not blocking, but consider aligning this label in a future cleanup.

verification_notes: Implementer reported `npm run build` passed with 41 routes.
Implementer reported targeted Playwright smoke passed: 22/22.
Implementer reported browser validation of /tools, /guides, and touched guide pages on production server with no Chrome console messages.
